also to give context for the 92 gate jumps thing, they aren’t just laid out flat all of the time, there’s one instance where you can actually just full jump it, however there’s also another instance where you’re forced to do a 5f into a decently tight full jump timing to get over another spike for a gate a block above

yeah, I mean it usually starts from like 6-8pm for me buuuuut
kira 3/4 of the guy directory is K3, look what you fucking did
I mean technically roulette can be done whenever you just gotta have someone in favor of hosting as well as people who wanna join

so Kira and I were discussing, often times roulette goes on very late into the night and I know I’m not in the roulette party rn (I do plan to join a week from Friday) at least for me I don’t think I’d be able to stay the entire time on Friday, however if it were split between Friday and Saturday more often that might could be more favorable
the only reason it's Friday is because that's what it has historically been all the way back from the Skype days
but there's been a lot of changes since the old roulettes
yeah, Friday as a day works perfectly fine for me, it’s more just how late it goes usually
it's like, the only reason I would want to do a roulette on a day other than Friday is because of major events or commitments
so idk if I would manage a Saturday roulette
but if someone else wants to do it I see no issue
you will never spook me, you will never shine me and you will never ghost me
the main reason we don't start earlier is because that's the time it works the best for the most people
maybe this can be your first 100 hour grind hexyraWow
dont forget to get your 42 finals
I try to have roulettes in the 3-5 hour range
if it goes longer I advocate for splitting
like, I usually see we get to around the 3 hour range then see what we have left
if I think we can beat it in less than 2 hours, we do it then
but if it's over 2 hours, I advocate splitting
it would suck to split roulette at game 7 and then have games 8, 9, and 10 be 5 minute clears
if you first try final i should be allowed to force you into one game
and then we don't have much of a day 2
yeah if I was just a fucking
and knew exactly the perfect place to split it in half every time
we could do two days always
but some days were at hour 3 game 2
some days were at hour 1 game 7

there's an additional step of vibe checking the games
no, not really. you hate all the good stuff i suggest so :(
both to serve as a good collection of thoughts and to serve as a list of "games we have played"

so when we roll in the future if we think we've played a game before we can search the channel
